response:
## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** Animated Onboarding Wizard With Unguarded Transitions **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Vestibular Motion, Cognitive Neurodivergent **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification, Contrast, Auditory, Keyboard, Screen Reader, Environmental --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 1 | | MAJOR | 4 | | MINOR | 2 | | ENHANCEMENT | 0 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed None — both escalated perspectives have findings. --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role **Front-End Dev** - Confetti animation violates 2.3.1 (no reduced-motion guard) — CRITICAL - Step icon bounce animation violates 2.3.1 (no reduced-motion guard) — MAJOR - Progress bar fill animation violates 2.3.1 (no reduced-motion guard) — MAJOR - Slide transitions violate 2.3.1 (no reduced-motion guard) — MAJOR - Confetti animation lacks pause control (2.2.2) — MAJOR **UX Design** - No alternative navigation path for multi-step wizard (2.4.5) — MINOR - Step icon animation may cause cognitive overload (3.2.6) — MINOR --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification None — all findings are code-level and verifiable from source. --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ## Detailed Findings ``` **Finding:** Confetti animation lacks reduced-motion guard and pause control **WCAG:** 2.3.1 (Three Flashes or Below Threshold), 2.2.2 (Pause, Stop, Hide) **Perspective:** Vestibular Motion **Severity:** CRITICAL **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** Confetti animation in `useEffect` creates 200+ particles with no `prefers-reduced-motion` check; no pause control in UI **Fix:** Wrap animation in `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)` and add visible pause button ``` ``` **Finding:** Step icon bounce animation lacks reduced-motion guard **WCAG:** 2.3.1 (Three Flashes or Below Threshold) **Perspective:** Vestibular Motion **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** `.step-icon.active` uses `@keyframes iconBounce` with no `prefers-reduced-motion` check **Fix:** Add `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)` to animation ``` ``` **Finding:** Progress bar fill animation lacks reduced-motion guard **WCAG:** 2.3.1 (Three Flashes or Below Threshold) **Perspective:** Vestibular Motion **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** `.progress-fill` transition has no `prefers-reduced-motion` check **Fix:** Add `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)` to transition ``` ``` **Finding:** Slide transitions lack reduced-motion guard **WCAG:** 2.3.1 (Three Flashes or Below Threshold) **Perspective:** Vestibular Motion **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** `.step-slider` inline transition has no `prefers-reduced-motion` check **Fix:** Add `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)` to transition ``` ``` **Finding:** No alternative navigation path for multi-step wizard **WCAG:** 2.4.5 (Multiple Ways) **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** Only linear navigation (Back/Next buttons) available **Fix:** Add step selector menu or direct navigation ``` ``` **Finding:** Step icon animation may cause cognitive overload **WCAG:** 3.2.6 (Consistent Help) **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** Bounce animation on step icons could be distracting **Fix:** Remove animation or make optional via settings ``` --- ## A11y Evidence Findings ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: vestibular-motion-confetti fingerprint: 3a7d4e1b8f9c6d2a source: perspective-audit Vestibular Motion checklist wcag_or_apg: 2.3.1 Three Flashes or Below Threshold section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(j)(3) severity: CRITICAL perspective_alarms: Vestibular Motion=HIGH, Cognitive Neurodivergent=MEDIUM evidence: Confetti animation in useEffect creates 200+ particles with no prefers-reduced-motion check reproduction_steps: Complete onboarding wizard, observe canvas animation expected_behavior: Animation disabled when prefers-reduced-motion is active actual_behavior: Confetti animation plays unconditionally trend: new ``` ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: cognitive-multiple-ways fingerprint: 5b8f3c2e9d1a7f6b source: perspective-audit Cognitive Neurodivergent checklist wcag_or_apg: 2.4.5 Multiple Ways section_508_fpc_context: 1194.31(c) severity: MINOR perspective_alarms: Vestibular Motion=HIGH, Cognitive Neurodivergent=MEDIUM evidence: Only linear navigation (Back/Next buttons) available reproduction_steps: Navigating through onboarding wizard expected_behavior: Multiple navigation paths available (e.g., step selector) actual_behavior: Only sequential navigation available trend: new ``` --- ## Key Code Citations 1. **Confetti animation (CRITICAL):** ```jsx useEffect(() => { if (!showConfetti || !canvasRef.current) return; // Creates 200+ particles with no reduced-motion check }, [showConfetti]); ``` 2. **Step icon bounce animation (MAJOR):** ```css @keyframes iconBounce { 0% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.3); } 100% { transform: scale(1); } } ``` 3. **Progress bar transition (MAJOR):** ```css .progress-fill { transition: width 0.5s ease; } ``` 4. **Slide transition (MAJOR):** ```jsx
``` --- ## Recommended Fixes 1. **Add `prefers-reduced-motion` guards** to all animations: ```css @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) { .progress-fill { transition: width 0.5s ease; } .step-slider { transition: transform 0.5s ease; } } ``` 2. **Add pause control** to confetti animation: ```jsx ``` 3. **Add step selector** for alternative navigation: ```jsx
{STEPS.map((s, i) => ( ))}
``` 4. **Remove or make optional** step icon animation for neurodivergent users. --- ## Severity Rationale - **CRITICAL (Confetti):** Violates 2.3.1 (flashing animation) and 2.2.2 (no pause control). - **MAJOR (Other animations):** Violates 2.3.1 but not at flashing threshold. - **MINOR (Navigation):** Missing alternative path but sequential navigation exists.
